scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev --workspace=client" "npm run dev --workspace=server"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ..
scripts.db:setup: cd server && npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed && cd ..
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
